license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bbk2ikye
title: Longitudinal Analysis of C elegans (L4, YA D2 & YA D5)
author: Priota Islam

steps_raw.instruction: Bleach synchronize the worms following the protocol Bleach synchronisation of C. elegans
Refeed the arrested L1s 2 days prior to tracking (Refeed per strain on 3 plates)
Prepare the imaging plates by seeding with 50ul OP50 and leave to dry on bench top/hood

Image the strains at the following stages: L4, Day 2 and Day 5. On the day of imaging, pick 5 worms per imaging plate and place on the Phenix rig to acclimatize for 30mins followed by imaging for 15minutes
Note: On D2 of the tracking, pick around 40 worms from each strain onto 2 new plates for D5 tracking, otherwise the plate will be too crowded, and it will be difficult to differentiate the age.
